speakFriend.title: ꯃꯤꯇꯩ ꯁꯤꯖꯤꯡꯕꯥ, ꯍꯦꯟꯊꯤꯕ।

speakFriend.bountyDescription: Liana Banyan {{language}} ꯂꯣꯟꯗꯥ ꯂꯣꯟꯁꯤꯡ ꯇꯧ। {{marks}} Marks ꯍꯩꯔꯤꯕꯤ।

speakFriend.step1Body: Help Wanted ꯗꯥ ꯂꯣꯟꯁꯤꯡ ꯊꯕꯛ ꯕꯨꯄꯥ।
speakFriend.step2Body: ꯊꯕꯛ ꯁ꯭ꯠꯔꯤꯡ ꯂꯣꯟꯁꯤꯡ ꯇꯧ। Bounty Poster ꯗꯥ ꯁꯦꯟꯗ।

speakFriend.subtitle: "Mit phi loi, chet."
